description: Legal document in Arabic script. Involving Ibrāhīm b. Sulaymān al-Yahūdī. Dated: 25(?) Jumādā II 6[..] AH. The rest of the date should be legible; the words are strangely elongated. Perhaps 684? There are additional pen trials/jottings in Arabic script, and two doodles of candelabras. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
